title: 50/30/20 Rule
body: Try splitting your income: 50% needs, 30% wants, 20% savings. It's a great baseline!

title: Track Small Expenses
body: Small daily purchases add up. meaningful savings often start with cutting the little things.

title: Emergency Fund
body: Aim for 3-6 months of expenses in savings. Start small – even ₹500 a month helps!

title: Review Subscriptions
body: Check your recurring payments. Cancel any streaming services or memberships you don't use.

title: Wait 24 Hours
body: Impulse buy? Wait 24 hours before purchasing. You might find you don't need it.

title: Automate Savings
body: Set up auto-transfers to your savings account on payday. Save before you spend!

title: Use Cash for Discretionary
body: Try using cash for weekly discretionary spending. It makes the money feel more 'real'.

title: Meal Prep
body: Cooking at home saves a fortune compared to ordering out. Try prepping 2-3 meals this week.

title: Check Your Credit
body: Regularly checking your credit score helps catch errors and motivates you to improve it.

title: Set Specific Goals
body: Instead of 'save more', try 'save ₹5000 for a trip by December'. Specificity helps!
